name: Myah Grier
ai_summary: Myah has 5-6 years of childcare experience from infants to teens, works as a substitute teacher, and is CPR/fire safety certified. She separates students during conflicts to discuss feelings, emphasizes non-aggressive communication, and brings deep passion for nurturing young minds.
